rows.label: qev086108_MSG0001
rows.name: Deep down, Tatsu always know...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086108_MSG0002
rows.name:
Tatsu nothing but delicious
ingredient to Lin-san.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086108_MSG0003
rows.name:
Amazing, wonderful,
best-ever ingredient...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086108_MSG0004
rows.name:
So delicious that it ruin all other food
for any who taste even one bite...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086108_MSG0005
rows.name:
Mmm... Tatsu get hungry even
just thinking of Tatsu...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086108_MSG0006
rows.name:
Mmm... Wait. What was Tatsu
talking about again?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086108_MSG0007
rows.name: [ST:undisp ]Mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086108_MSG0008
rows.name: Mo-mo-mo-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086108_MSG0009
rows.name: Where the heck did he go?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086108_MSG0010
rows.name: GYAAAAAGH![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086108_MSG0011
rows.name: TATSU![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086108_MSG0012
rows.name: This way![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086108_MSG0013
rows.name: Mo-mo-mo! Beastie not want to eat Tatsu![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086108_MSG0014
rows.name:
One taste of Tatsu will ruin
beastie for all other food![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086108_MSG0015
rows.name: Tatsu not want things to end this way...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086108_MSG0016
rows.name:
Better eaten by friend Lin-san
than freaky beastie...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086108_MSG0017
rows.name: G-good-bye, Lin-san...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086108_MSG0018
rows.name: Tatsu![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086108_MSG0020
rows.name:
Tatsu, you big dummy! Why'd
you run off like that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086108_MSG0021
rows.name: Lin-san?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev086108_MSG0022
rows.name:
All right, ugly, you asked for
it! No one eats my friend![ST:wait ]
